payload.title: Public routing: serve / unauthenticated, relocate the authed app behind auth
payload.description: Restructure the cloud-mode Express routing so public pages (landing, features, docs) are served WITHOUT auth, while the kanban SPA + /api/* stay gated. Move the app to /app (or a subpath), add a public static/site layer, 404 handling, and ensure /healthz stays public. Foundation for the rest of the epic.
